channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: Shooting at a lakeside party near Oklahoma City sends at least 13 people to hospitals
item.description: Police and hospital officials say a shooting at a party at a lake near Oklahoma City has sent at least 13 people to hospitals.

item.title: Rudy Giuliani hospitalized in critical condition, his spokesman says
United flight landing in Newark strikes pole on New Jersey Turnpike, damages delivery truck
